name: genxtaxi-ai-platform
description: GenXTaxi AI platform — ai-gateway, currency-service, and shared libraries (Phase 1 foundation).

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter ./packages/** run build && pnpm -r --filter ./ai-gateway --filter ./currency-service run build
scripts.openapi: pnpm --filter ai-gateway run openapi && pnpm --filter currency-service run openapi
